titleStmt.title: SII 9.143: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 143. (A.R. No. 519 of 1915.) ON A SLAB SET UP NEAR THE MANURE-PIT OF RACHAPPA AT THE SAME VILLAGE.

summary.p: This is dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 4, Siddhārthi, Jyēshṭha, śu. 10, Bṛihaspativāra. (See the preceding number). It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva and mentions the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Jōyimayyarasa as ruling over Sindavāḍi thosand. It records that, with the consent of Jōyimayya, Pergaḍe KaMbaṇṇa made a grant of a mattar of wet land, 50 māttārs of black land and 450 kammas of flower garden in Tumbuḷa, for the service of the god Kambēśvara set up by him.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastabhuvanrāśaya śrīpṛthivīvallabha rājādhirāja paramē
śvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābha
raṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvaravijaya rājya
muttarōttarābhivirddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkka
tāraṁ saluttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi samadhigatapaṁca
mahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaranahitamaṇḍaḷikamadanamahēśvara
nijakuḷakuvaḷayasudhākaraṁ vinayaratnākaraṁ seṇasuma
ṇḍaḷikataleyakaravattanoḍḍugaṇḍu suttaṁbaḷasuva ma
ṇḍaḷikara maṇḍeyanaḍevaṁ maṟevugekāvaṁ viṣamaturagārū
ḍhaprauḍharēvaṁtanahitakṛtāṁtanubhayabaḷaraṇācā
ryyanacaḷitadhairyyaṁ śrīmallikārjjunadēvalabdhava
raprasādaṁ patihitavinōdaṁ śrīmattraibhuvanama
lladēvapēsaṇagaruḍaṁ nāmādisamastaprasastisahi
taṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ jōyimayyarasar siṁdavāḍi sā
siramaṁ bīḷānuvirttiyiṁ tṛbhōgābhyaṁtarasuddhiyināḷdu sukhadinarasu
geyya tatpādapadmōpajīvi . samastarājyabharanirūpita mahāmātyapa
davīvirājamāna mānamānōnnataprabhumaṁtrōtsāhaśaktitrayasaṁ
pannaṁ sujanaprasannaṁ sukavisukanikaraphaḷitāṁbrabhūja hayavaccharāja vijaya
rāyadisāpaṭṭaṁ subhaṭakaṁsavaṭṭaṁ patigēkaḷāpaṁ jayāṁganānīḍaṁ haracaraṇasmaraṇa
pariṇatāṁtaḥkaraṇaṁ vikramābharaṇaṁ nāmādisamastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmatperggaḍe
kaṁbaṇaṁ cāḷukyavikramavarṣada 4 neya siddhārthisaṁvatsarada jyēṣṭa su 10 bṛhaspativā
radaṁdu jōgasamudradudyāpanada tātkāladoḷ maṇḍaḷikaṁge biṁnapaṁgeydu tanna māḍi
sida kaṁbēśvaradēvargge rājadhāni tuṁbuḷa taḷavirttiyoḷpaḍedu rājaguru sōmaśivapa
ṇḍitargge dhārāpūrvakammāḍi dēvaraṁgabhōgakkaṁ caitrapavitrakkaṁ koṭṭa kariyanelammatta 50 .
jōyiyasamudrada keḷagaṇa gaḻde matta 1 pūdōṁṭa kamma 450 Ā keyyoḷage dēvara pū
jāri sadāndajīryagge mattaru 5 .
Digital edition of SII 9.143 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
